_provenance.captured_git_ref: main @ Merge W3a (PR #13): builder correctness + grounding/bare-comp validators (S6)
_provenance.lane_r_revalidation_on_current_main: After capture, origin/main advanced 6a2f461->572ceed (W4a build-entry consolidation PR#16 + BUG-3 v0.2.1 bridge fixes PR#15, both touching toe_builder_bridge.py). Branch was merged up to 572ceed; all 13 blessed traces re-replayed PASS on the 572ceed builder (s11 SKIP), and verdicts.json is BYTE-IDENTICAL across all four Lane-R sweeps (2x on 6a2f461, 2x on 572ceed) -> the replay-gate is deterministic AND builder-invariant across the snapshot pair, so CI Lane R is green on current main. The model-lane baseline statistics stay pinned to 6a2f461 (a fresh full capture is a D-E release-tag requirement regardless).
_provenance.mixed_snapshot_disclosure: s01-s09 model trials were sampled+scored on cbf01f1, whose builder LACKS W3a's grounding_validator and component_source_validator (pipeline stages 2.5/3.5). 7 of those 9 scenarios (s01-s04,s06-s08) carry validate:PASS and thus ran a 4-stage pipeline; current main runs 6 stages. The 8-field agent-identity block is INVARIANT across cbf01f1<->6a2f461 (server_version is a hardcoded '0.2.0' constant), so --compare cannot detect this split; this note + the git_sha are the only record.
_provenance.reuse_safeguard: All 9 reused blessed traces (s01-s09) were re-validated by Lane R IN-PROCESS on 6a2f461 and PASS (2026-07-05) -> the post-W3a builder still produces valid artifacts from those exact call patterns (builder-neutrality proven through W3a).
_provenance.s01_s09_source: REUSED verbatim from run baseline-n5 in worktree magical-moore-f0701c @ cbf01f1 (pre-W3a, 2026-07-04). Model-sampled there; NOT re-sampled on 6a2f461. Owner-approved reuse 2026-07-05 with full knowledge of the snapshot gap.
_provenance.s10_s14_source: freshly captured n=5 on 6a2f461 (run baseline-n5-tail), spend $8.21
_provenance.rebless_2026_07_14: PR #24/#26 surface re-bless (main @ cc0a6c5): the OFFLINE identity is UNCHANGED (tool_inventory_hash 1c81e8b4... constant across the change — 17 tool names identical; hybrid_search's hit shape gained parameter_names/score_kind/parameters_capped/compact + sequence-block collapse, and all 13 blessed traces re-replay PASS against the new envelopes, verdicts.json byte-identical across two Lane-R sweeps). The LIVE surface DID change (21->22, get_glsl_status) and the 8-field identity was blind to it, so live_tool_inventory_hash joined the identity block; the value below is stamped from the static 22-tool list at re-bless time, NOT from capture time (the model-lane statistics in this file never touched live tools — Lane M allowed only the 17 offline tools when they were sampled). Scenarios s15-s17 (live-surface tier-1) added born-aspirational with no blessed traces; s18 (hybrid collapse fidelity) is offline and WAS blessed at add time (traces/s18_param_collapse_fidelity.jsonl, from run s18-dev-4). Per §5 an unblessed scenario joins the baseline only via a fresh capture.
_provenance.s19_s21_added_2026_07_16: W7 register_component companion (main @ 1e84d76, post-PR #37): s19 register->search roundtrip, s20 exact-name direct-injection under a 4-char name override, s21 Δ1 hit-parity (user hits carry score_kind but never parameter_names/parameters). All three are offline, gate:true BY DESIGN, and carry a new 'tool:register_component' requires token so they SKIP (never ERROR) on a checkout that predates #37. Their traces were blessed from a Lane M capture at the 18-tool identity; this file's identity block is NOT refreshed here and still carries the pre-#37 17-tool tool_inventory_hash + the pre-#37 guidance_hash, so `--lane replay --compare` against it REFUSES (rc 3) until the queued partial-recapture re-bless runs -- pre-existing since PR #40 wired --compare into CI Lane R (advisory, continue-on-error), NOT introduced by this PR. s19-s21 are absent from `scenarios`/`gate_set` deliberately: gate membership is EARNED at n/n, so the next --capture-baseline must INCLUDE them. Note --capture-baseline rewrites this file from scratch and does not carry _provenance forward -- hand-restore this block (including the s15-s17/s18 correction above) at the next capture.
